content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/tests/test_app.py:1	import pytest2	from app import app, db3	from models import URL4	5	@pytest.fixture6	def client():7	    app.config['TESTING'] = True8	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///:memory:'9	    with app.test_client() as client:10	        with app.app_context():11	            db.create_all()12	        yield client13	14	def test_index_page(client):15	    response = client.get('/')16	    assert response.status_code == 20017	    assert b'URL Shortener' in response.data18	19	def test_shorten_url(client):20	    response = client.post('/', data={'url': 'https://www.google.com'}, follow_redirects=True)21	    assert response.status_code == 20022	    assert b'Shortened URL:' in response.data23	    24	    with app.app_context():25	        url = URL.query.filter_by(original_url='https://www.google.com').first()26	        assert url is not None27	        assert len(url.short_id) == 628	29	def test_redirect(client):30	    # First shorten a URL31	    client.post('/', data={'url': 'https://www.python.org'})32	    33	    with app.app_context():34	        url = URL.query.filter_by(original_url='https://www.python.org').first()35	        short_id = url.short_id36	    37	    # Then try to access it38	    response = client.get(f'/{short_id}')39	    assert response.status_code == 30240	    assert response.location == 'https://www.python.org'41	42	def test_invalid_short_id(client):43	    response = client.get('/nonexistent')44	    assert response.status_code == 404
